title: Am-Tech-Deluxe-Heberpumpe
features: VERSATILE: This multi-purpose siphon pump can be used for transferring liquids and gasses and is ideal for changing oil or siphoning gas
ALSO FOR INFLATING: It is also suitable for pumping up inflatables like sports balls and beach toys
ACCESSORIES: It is provided with all the necessary tubes and adaptors
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
description: From the manufacturer Product Description The Amtech Siphon Pump is a very all-round handy tool for the garage, it syphons fuel and other liquids and can also be used for inflatables, such as beach toys and swimming accessories. This Amtech Siphon Pump Kit includes tubes & adapters so you are ready to use instantly. The fuel syphon pump is also made up of acid-resistant plastic, so you can transfer oil and siphon gas without hesitation. This is a useful product for garages and car repair shops. It can be easily stored for emergency use. Amtech S1495 Siphon Pump Features Multi-Use: This fuel pump is an ideal product for garages, car repair shops and even for marine usage, such as, emptying and/or cleaning fish tanks. Kit Includes : This Amtech Siphon Pump Kit includes the air pump, adapter, tubes, large bore hoses, small-bore hoses, and tyre and raft inflator tips. Suitable for : You can use this product to transfer oil and petrol. This Amtech Siphon pump is mainly used to transfer liquids, gas, water, and siphoning gas easily.
